creator: kristinacors
caption: If you love this aesthetic, you’ll love my NYC itinerary. It has 28 hand picked hidden gems that took me years to find! I categorized each spot by neighborhood and mapped them out so the places you visit each day are all close to each other! Shop my 7 day New York City itinerary at the link in my bio! #nychotels #luxuryhotels #ritzcarlton #nycitinerary #newyorkluxury

transcription.text: It's beautiful, how they speak, the melody settles all over me, oh my
